moves_today: Reach out to NGA's GEOINT office to inquire about potential OSINT/Commercial GEOINT vehicle opportunities.
Target the Army's ITES-SW contract and contact Deloitte to discuss potential sub opportunities.
Monitor the DIU's website for new OTAs related to AI/ML and GEOINT.
top_3: The DoD's recent budget increase for AI/ML and GEOINT presents a prime opportunity for EDF to expand its presence in the DoD market. Position EDF's AI-ready, daily global coverage data as a key enabler for these initiatives.
The recent award of a GEOINT contract to Leidos creates a prime opportunity for EDF to sub its data to Leidos. Contact Leidos to discuss potential sub opportunities.

The upcoming NASA SEWP solicitation presents a prime opportunity for EDF to expand its presence in the NASA market. Position EDF's daily global coverage data as a key enabler for NASA's Earth observation initiatives.
contacts: Contact Deloitte to discuss potential sub opportunities for EDF's data on their recently won GEOINT contract.
Reach out to the Army's ITES-SW contract manager to discuss potential sub opportunities for EDF's data.
dept_moves: The recent appointment of a new PM at NGA's GEOINT office creates an opportunity for EDF to establish a relationship and position its data for future opportunities.
The DoD's recent budget increase for AI/ML and GEOINT creates a prime opportunity for EDF to expand its presence in the DoD market.
competitive: Maxar's recent loss of an incumbent contract creates an opportunity for EDF to pursue a new contract. Flag this as a potential opportunity for EDF.
Planet Labs' recent award of a large contract creates a competitive threat for EDF. Monitor their activities closely and be prepared to adjust EDF's strategy accordingly.
vehicles: EDF should use the NASA SEWP vehicle to pursue opportunities with NASA.
EDF should use the DIU's OTA vehicle to pursue opportunities related to AI/ML and GEOINT.
